text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 30 

ESRD_IND 

LABEL: End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This field specifies whether a beneficiary is entitled to Medicare benefits due to end stage renal 
disease (ESRD). 

SHORT NAME: ESRD_IND 

LONG NAME: ESRD_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: Y = the beneficiary has ESRD coverage 
0 = the
